deferred_items.name: stack_linker_breather
deferred_items.reason: Real import/dependency mismatch; repair candidate preserved but canonical authority deferred for later Forge-internal repair.

deferred_items.name: excluded/deferred engine set
deferred_items.reason: 26 excluded total; 24 deferred; no delete/quarantine/promote action authorized.

plain_english: Forge now has a roadmap-grounded build sequence. Stuck repairs are tracked as deferred work instead of hijacking the whole roadmap.
